# Normalize top-k routing weights

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/normalize_weight_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/normalize_weight_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `normalize_weight` |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="normalize_weight_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileM = 16>
void normalize_weight(float *topk_weights, float *denominator,
                      float *normalized_weights) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0, "NumTopk must be multiple of 8 (float 32B align)");
    constexpr float kEps = 1e-20f;
    constexpr int kTiles = NumTokens / TileM;
    constexpr int kTailM = NumTokens % TileM;

    using namespace pto;

    using gm_in  = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
    using gm_den = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, 1>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;

    using tile_mat = LocalTile< float, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_sum = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;

    using it_mat = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_mat>;
    using it_den = global_iterator<gm_den, tile_sum>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_mat>;

    it_mat in_iter(topk_weights);
    it_out out_iter(normalized_weights);
    it_den den_iter(denominator);

    auto run = [&](auto &in_it, auto &out_it, auto &den_it, int t) {
        auto gi = in_it(t, 0);
        auto go = out_it(t, 0);
        auto gd = den_it(t, 0);
        tile_mat src, dst;
        tile_sum sum, denom, recip;
        TLOAD(src, gi);
        TROWSUM(sum, src);
        TADDS(denom, sum, kEps);
        TRECIP(recip, denom);
        TROWEXPANDMUL(dst, src, recip);
        TSTORE(gd, denom);
        TSTORE(go, dst);
    };

    for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) run(in_iter, out_iter, den_iter, t);

    if constexpr (kTailM != 0) {
        using tile_mat_r = LocalTile< float, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor, kTailM, NumTopk>;
        using tile_sum_r = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, kTailM, 1>;
        using it_mat_r = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_mat_r>;
        using it_out_r = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_mat_r>;
        using it_den_r = global_iterator<gm_den, tile_sum_r>;
        it_mat_r in_r(topk_weights);
        it_out_r out_r(normalized_weights);
        it_den_r den_r(denominator);
        auto gi = in_r(kTiles, 0);
        auto go = out_r(kTiles, 0);
        auto gd = den_r(kTiles, 0);
        tile_mat_r src, dst;
        tile_sum_r sum, denom, recip;
        TLOAD(src, gi);
        TROWSUM(sum, src);
        TADDS(denom, sum, kEps);
        TRECIP(recip, denom);
        TROWEXPANDMUL(dst, src, recip);
        TSTORE(gd, denom);
        TSTORE(go, dst);
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADDS`](../../../intrinsics/tadds.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TRECIP`](../../../intrinsics/trecip.md), [`TROWEXPANDMUL`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpandmul.md), [`TROWSUM`](../../../intrinsics/trowsum.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    ```cpp title="normalize_weight_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_NORMALIZE_WEIGHT_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_NORMALIZE_WEIGHT_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileM = 16>
    void normalize_weight(float *topk_weights, float *denominator,
                          float *normalized_weights) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0, "NumTopk must be multiple of 8 (float 32B align)");
        constexpr float kEps = 1e-20f;
        constexpr int kTiles = NumTokens / TileM;
        constexpr int kTailM = NumTokens % TileM;

        using namespace pto;

        using gm_in  = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using gm_den = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, 1>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;

        using tile_mat = LocalTile< float, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_sum = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;

        using it_mat = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_mat>;
        using it_den = global_iterator<gm_den, tile_sum>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_mat>;

        it_mat in_iter(topk_weights);
        it_out out_iter(normalized_weights);
        it_den den_iter(denominator);

        auto run = [&](auto &in_it, auto &out_it, auto &den_it, int t) {
            auto gi = in_it(t, 0);
            auto go = out_it(t, 0);
            auto gd = den_it(t, 0);
            tile_mat src, dst;
            tile_sum sum, denom, recip;
            TLOAD(src, gi);
            TROWSUM(sum, src);
            TADDS(denom, sum, kEps);
            TRECIP(recip, denom);
            TROWEXPANDMUL(dst, src, recip);
            TSTORE(gd, denom);
            TSTORE(go, dst);
        };

        for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) run(in_iter, out_iter, den_iter, t);

        if constexpr (kTailM != 0) {
            using tile_mat_r = LocalTile< float, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor, kTailM, NumTopk>;
            using tile_sum_r = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, kTailM, 1>;
            using it_mat_r = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_mat_r>;
            using it_out_r = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_mat_r>;
            using it_den_r = global_iterator<gm_den, tile_sum_r>;
            it_mat_r in_r(topk_weights);
            it_out_r out_r(normalized_weights);
            it_den_r den_r(denominator);
            auto gi = in_r(kTiles, 0);
            auto go = out_r(kTiles, 0);
            auto gd = den_r(kTiles, 0);
            tile_mat_r src, dst;
            tile_sum_r sum, denom, recip;
            TLOAD(src, gi);
            TROWSUM(sum, src);
            TADDS(denom, sum, kEps);
            TRECIP(recip, denom);
            TROWEXPANDMUL(dst, src, recip);
            TSTORE(gd, denom);
            TSTORE(go, dst);
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
